holdings.infoBox: DHS is an equity ETF with a total of 323 individual holdings. The top holdings are AbbVie stock at 4.37%, Merck & Co. at 3.83%, Altria Group at 3.68%, Texas Instruments at 3.62%, and Exxon Mobil at 3.27%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree U.S. High Dividend Fund (DHS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the WisdomTree U.S. High Dividend index. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of high-dividend-paying US companies. The index excludes companies with a market cap of less than $200 million. DHS was launched on Jun 16, 2006 and is issued by WisdomTree.
